commands.review_summary:
The branch updates `SettingsPage.xaml` to wrap the scroll content in a stretch `Grid`, move padding onto the inner stack, and place the transient Saved InfoBar as a bottom-right overlay.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence runtime reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection supports the reported mismatch because SettingsPage lacks the finite-width wrapper pattern that ConnectionPage documents and uses.
commands.review_followup: There is no narrow code defect for ClawSweeper to repair; the remaining action is validation reporting and ordinary maintainer review.

target.title: Settings page: match canonical page sizing (centered Stretch+MaxWidth=900)
target.body: Align the Settings page layout with the rest of the Companion Settings pages (ConnectionPage / SkillsPage / PermissionsPage). Before this change, Settings rendered left-shifted vs. other pages at wide window widths. **Fix** - Move `Padding=24` from `ScrollViewer` onto the inner `StackPanel`. - Add the canonical `` wrapper inside the `ScrollViewer` so the StackPanel's `Stretch + MaxWidth=900` measures against a finite viewport width and centers with growing side margins (instead of collapsing to the children's natural width). - Collapse the previous two-row outer Grid into a single-cell Grid; the `SavedInfoBar` now floats as a bottom-right overlay (`VerticalAlignment=Bottom`), matching the rest of the pages. **Validation** - `./build.ps1` ✅ - Manual: launched tray locally and confirmed Settings now centers identically to Permissions, with two equal side bars as the window grows past 900px.
target.author: bkudiess
